description: Sync, search, and analyze your Fathom meeting recordings — transcripts, summaries, and action items — offline and at scale.

tools.name: meetings_list
tools.description: List meetings with optional filters and included data. Optional: calendar_invitees_domains, calendar_invitees_domains_type, created_after (plus 8 more).

params.name: calendar_invitees_domains_type
params.description: Domain filter type: all, only_internal, one_or_more_external

params.name: created_after
params.description: Filter meetings created after this ISO 8601 timestamp

params.name: created_before
params.description: Filter meetings created before this ISO 8601 timestamp

params.name: include_action_items
params.description: Include action items in each meeting

params.name: include_transcript
params.description: Include full transcript with speaker attribution

tools.name: recordings_get-summary
tools.description: Get AI-generated meeting summary in markdown format. Required: recording_id. Optional: destination_url.

params.name: recording_id
params.description: Numeric recording ID from meeting list

tools.name: recordings_get-transcript
tools.description: Get full transcript for a recording with speaker attribution and timestamps. Required: recording_id. Optional: destination_url.

params.name: recording_id
params.description: Numeric recording ID from meeting list

tools.name: team-members_list
tools.description: List team members, optionally filtered by team name. Optional: team, cursor.

tools.name: teams_list
tools.description: List all teams accessible to your account. Optional: cursor.

tools.name: webhooks_create
tools.description: Create a webhook to receive meeting data on completion. Required: destination_url, triggered_for. Optional: include_action_items, include_crm_matches, include_summary (plus 1 more).

params.name: destination_url
params.description: URL to POST meeting data to when triggered

params.name: include_action_items
params.description: Include action items in webhook payload

params.name: include_crm_matches
params.description: Include CRM matches in webhook payload

params.name: include_summary
params.description: Include AI summary in webhook payload

params.name: include_transcript
params.description: Include full transcript in webhook payload

tools.name: webhooks_delete
tools.description: Delete a webhook by ID. Required: id. Destructive.
